name: cogability-packages
description: Monorepo for the @cogability/sdk and @cogability/membership-kit npm packages.

scripts.test:install: rm -rf /tmp/cogability-pkg-install-test && mkdir /tmp/cogability-pkg-install-test && cd /tmp/cogability-pkg-install-test && npm init -y > /dev/null && npm install @cogability/sdk @cogability/membership-kit && node -e "const sdk = require('@cogability/sdk'); console.log('OK:', Object.keys(sdk).join(', '));"
